title: Attribution
description: Ads v1 attribution contract linking funnel events to verified revenue while preserving attribution conflict handling.
$comment: Sources: PACK-07 and TECH-07 Ads Measurement. Ads cannot treat comments, inbox, quote, cart, order draft, unpaid order, or pending revenue as verified revenue. TODO: source documents do not define a complete attribution rule schema.

channel_context_id.description: Channel context that produced the funnel signal.

verified_revenue_id.description: Verified revenue reference required for official ROAS.

attribution_rule_id.description: Attribution rule used. TODO: define official attribution rule registry.

conflict_status.description: Attribution conflict status. TODO: define official conflict enum.

conflict_reasons.description: Source-backed reasons attribution is conflicted or blocked.
